fields.name: section-title
fields.label: Section Title
fields.description: Main heading for the tabs section.

fields.name: tabs-heading
fields.label: Tabs Heading (ARIA Label)
fields.description: Accessible label for the tab list navigation.

fields.name: tab-label
fields.label: Tab Label
fields.description: Visible label for this tab button.

fields.name: tab-id
fields.label: Tab ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for this tab (used to link button and panel). Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

fields.name: tab-id
fields.label: Parent Tab ID
fields.description: ID of the tab this card belongs to. Must match a Tabs Item Tab ID.

fields.name: panel-heading
fields.label: Panel Heading
fields.description: Heading for the active card panel.

fields.name: panel-subtitle
fields.label: Panel Subtitle
fields.description: Short description shown under the panel heading.

fields.name: card-name
fields.label: Primary Card Name
fields.description: Name of the primary card shown in the list and detail area.

fields.name: card-tag
fields.label: Primary Card Tag
fields.description: Optional pill label for the primary card (e.g. 'Newly launched').

fields.name: primaryCtaLink
fields.label: Primary CTA Link
fields.description: Destination for the primary CTA button (e.g. Apply Now).

fields.name: primaryCtaLinkText
fields.label: Primary CTA Text
fields.description: Visible text for the primary CTA button.

fields.name: secondaryCtaLink
fields.label: Secondary CTA Link
fields.description: Destination for the secondary CTA button (e.g. Know More).

fields.name: secondaryCtaLinkText
fields.label: Secondary CTA Text
fields.description: Visible text for the secondary CTA button.

fields.name: tab-id
fields.label: Parent Tab ID
fields.description: ID of the tab this meta pill belongs to. Must match a Tabs Item Tab ID.

fields.name: meta-pill
fields.label: Meta Pill Text
fields.description: Short label shown as a pill (e.g. 'Low interest').

fields.name: tab-id
fields.label: Parent Tab ID
fields.description: ID of the tab this feature belongs to. Must match a Tabs Item Tab ID.

fields.name: feature
fields.label: Feature Text
fields.description: Feature or benefit description shown in the list.
